publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 141-142. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest W. I am obliged to send up to Town on purpose, in consequence of Madme de Ste A's statement received this morning; & which is of such a nature, that I think it proper to inform Dr Lushington, Mr Wharton, & Mr Murray, without delay. You know what it
is to have complicated & humerous letters to write (under pressure too for time) in such an affair as this.
You will therefore understand that my brain is at this moment in no enviable state; & that I can only do the necessary, & not add to it by now explaining to you fully.
Bertraud is the name of Madme de Ste A's servant.
statement to my mother, or you should have it.--
It is most likely, I think, that it will be now wished I & Madme de Ste A-- should negotiate about an arbitraton.
Best could not return here today; which he much regretted.--
I wish this damned affair (that is indeed the only suitable or proper adjective) were over. It swallows up all my energies & peace; & I
scarcely manage to keep patience & composure with anything or anybody.
